title: Databricks CEO: We Don't Need AI To Get Smarter
transcript:
Ali Godsey is with us, the CEO and
cofounder of Databricks, one of the most valuable private companies that has yet to file confidentially
with the SEC. As far as we know. We're gonna hold back on IPO chat for
a minute and ask you about whether you whether this moment of all of these companies
looking to access capital in the public markets, is that an anxiety for you? Could there

there's gonna be a lot of capital available in private markets. So, no, that's not gonna

waking up and going, okay. Wow. This is this is today. Yeah. My view is that we're in a

AIs that you use, the frontier models, are smarter than most of the people you work

Everybody's focused on superintelligence, and can we, like, continue the scaling laws? And the problem is,

is focused on. You know, that's our only focus is how do we infuse that data

I think this is the most important, question that people should focus on right now. And we've got plenty new products. Like, as

Base. I think about some of the m and a that you've been doing the market to beef up the off product offerings. What's hitting home at
